creator: euan@potensol.com
text:
(In reply to Franz Bettag from comment #4)

I think your CPU issue is unrelated. My issues were random crashes without any noticable CPU load. I am 90% sure they were virtual memory related. This would make sense since Linux uses a different VM system, and OpenSER/OpenSIPS/Kamailio have a track record in memory leaks and related problems.
